description_long: This shopping mall features a modern, angular design with multiple interconnected buildings arranged around a central plaza. The roofs are covered with blue solar panels, and the exterior walls are clad in a mix of beige stone and blue paneling. Several large, curved canopies with signage extend from the rooftops, providing shade and visual interest. The entrance area is lined with palm trees and wide walkways, leading up to the main doors. The mall is situated adjacent to a large body of water, with paved surfaces and open spaces for pedestrian access. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on sustainability and open, inviting public spaces.
description: A modern shopping mall with blue solar-panel roofs, beige stone walls, and prominent canopies, surrounded by palm trees and open walkways near water.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance lined with palm trees, wide walkways, and prominent blue canopies with signage.
description_view_1: From this angle, the interconnected buildings, rooftop solar panels, and the proximity to water are clearly visible.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the central plaza, the arrangement of the buildings, and the extensive use of blue solar panels.
description_view_3: This side view showcases the L-shaped layout, blue paneling, and the continuation of the solar-panel roofs, with palm trees visible at the far end.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large, modern blue and white signage with text and logos is mounted on curved canopies above entrances and on the roof, made of metal and acrylic, not visibly illuminated.
